purpose: Field-by-field comparison of original vs replayed journal entries per PDF Phase 2 requirements
methodology: Extracts original journal lines, replays with identical parameters, compares every field

financial_equivalence.detail: Debit and credit totals match exactly between original and replay

structural_match.detail: Line count, account IDs, debit amounts, credit amounts all match

trace_id.detail: Replay generates new UUID for isolation

hash_chain_integrity.detail: Replayed entry links correctly to previous chain entry

balanced_entry.detail: Total debits === total credits for replayed entry

known_divergences.reason: Intentional — marks replay entries for audit trail distinction
known_divergences.pdf_impact: MINOR — not a financial field, does not affect ledger integrity

known_divergences.reason: Intentional — replay captures current time of proof execution
known_divergences.pdf_impact: MINOR — timestamps are execution-time metadata, not transaction data

known_divergences.reason: Intentional — replay adds proof markers for traceability
known_divergences.pdf_impact: MINOR — additional metadata does not alter financial data

known_divergences.reason: Intentional — replay entries tagged for identification
known_divergences.pdf_impact: MINOR — tags are organizational, not financial

known_divergences.reason: Intentional — each replay gets unique trace for isolation
known_divergences.pdf_impact: MINOR — trace_id is for correlation, not financial data
MINOR — reference is organizational, not financial

verdict: FINANCIAL EQUIVALENCE PROVEN — All financial fields (account_id, debit, credit, total_debit, total_credit, status, balanced) match exactly. Non-financial divergences are intentional and documented.
